title: Morgan's Direct - Heavy Duty Tape Dispenser with 3 Tape Rolls – Weighted Anti-Slip Desktop Tape Dispenser for Warehouse, Office & Home, Includes 3 x 40m Clear Tape
features: HEAVY DUTY WEIGHTED TAPE DISPENSER - Robust, stable design with a weighted, rubberised anti-slip base allows smooth one-handed tape dispensing, ideal for high-use environments.
INCLUDES 3 TAPE REFILL ROLLS - Supplied with three clear adhesive tape rolls (40m each), offering excellent value and ready-to-use convenience straight out of the box.
SHARP CUTTING EDGE FOR CLEAN RESULTS - Features a strong metal cutting blade that delivers clean, precise cuts across a variety of tape types, reducing waste and improving efficiency.
DUAL CORE DESIGN – STANDARD TAPE COMPATIBLE - Fits standard size tape refills, making replacements quick and easy. Suitable for office tape, packaging tape, and general-purpose adhesive rolls.
IDEAL FOR WAREHOUSE, OFFICE & DESK USE - Perfect for packing stations, post rooms, offices, reception desks, and home workspaces where durability and reliability are essential.
description: Product Description About Us With the consumer shopping trend shifting over the years to online Freddie Morgan started trading online and the brand Morgan’s Direct was born. Over the years, we’ve grown, developed, and extended our offering to provide the very best in stationery, art & craft, and office supplies. Morgan’s Direct has been trading for 7 years supplying businesses small & large and family households with quality brands we have a great offering from Pentel, Lamy, plus many more. We aim like any business to expand and develop while still being able to achieve our morals which are; To tailor our service to individual customer needs. To provide a high-level shopping experience. To provide customers with a wide range of quality products at affordable prices. Morgan's Direct Heavy Duty Weighted Tape Dispenser Strong & Weighted! A robust, weighted, heavy duty tape dispenser is perfect for packing orders in a warehouse. Very Sharp cutting Edge! Sharp cutter works effectively on a variety of different types of tape, including clear acrylic tape commonly used for wrapping Christmas and Birthday presents. Included 3 Tape Refills! The tape dispenser come supplied with three rolls of 40M length tape, so you can start using the tape dispenser straight away. Dual core fits small and large rolls of tape. Frequently Asked Questions. How many Tapes are included? There is 3 rolls of tape included. How long is each roll of tape? Each tape covers 40 meters. Is the dispenser stable? Yes, very there is even a rubberised base for increased stability. Can you use other tape? Yes, Due to the strong cutting edge most tape will be able to be used.
